compiled_state.title: Stage-boundary manifest documentation: schema, validator/consumer guides, ops runbook, pinned contracts
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Scope
Produce the epic's final documentation: PRECONDITIONS schema reference, validator-writer guide, consumer-reader guide, operational runbook, and the pinned-contracts index that consolidates the invariants established in Stories 1-6.

## Done Definitions
- **Schema reference** (per tier): minimal/standard/deep field shapes with examples; schema_version evolution policy; field-addition guidance.
- **Validator developer guide**: how to add a new stage-boundary validator — depth-agnostic contract, schema-roundtrip self-verification, cross-stage chain verification, zero-user-interaction invariant.
- **Consumer developer guide**: how to consume PRECONDITIONS as a reader — `_read_latest_preconditions` semantics, composite-key LWW, snapshot-vs-flat-event handling, legacy-ticket graceful-degrade.
- **Operational runbook**: FP auto-fallback behavior and observability markers, legacy-ticket handling, compaction timing, baseline-vs-measurement methodology, diagnostic log formats.
- **Pinned contracts index** (the load-bearing invariants):
  1. Latest-selection + LWW contract (Story 1)
  2. Depth-agnostic validator contract (Story 2)
  3. Self-verification semantics (Story 2)
  4. schema_version forward-compat policy (Story 3)
  5. Compaction ordering contract (Story 5)
  6. FP auto-fallback scope contract (Story 6)
- p95 latency budgets published (final values from Story 6 benchmarks).
- Doc placement: `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/` (project-local per CLAUDE.md rule — no dev-team artifacts under plugins/dso/).
- Cross-links from relevant skill/agent instruction files (preplanning, sprint, commit, harvest-worktree, completion-verifier, merge-to-main, ticket CLI) to the schema + runbook.

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Contract doc is the authoritative source — any future tier or field addition must update both the schema reference and the evolution policy.
- [Rollout] Runbook ships with the final story; until Story 7 lands, operators rely on inline skill comments for ops-time questions.
